label: Enacted law or binding COP instrument
definition: Enacted dedicated laws, regulations, or binding child online protection instruments are in force.

label: Advanced draft pathway
definition: A draft bill, draft law, or primary legislative pathway is in motion.

label: Strategy, guideline, or policy only
definition: A dedicated strategy, guideline, or policy exists without primary legislative backing.

label: General legal coverage
definition: Broader cybercrime, penal, telecom, data protection, or child protection frameworks provide only partial relevance.

label: No identifiable framework
definition: No specific legislation, regulation, or policy framework on child online safety is identified.
